name: Self-Employed Professional — Form T2203 Interprovincial Allocation
description: Complete Julian Rossi's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\. Julian has a permanent establishment in both Ontario and Alberta and must allocate his business income accordingly. Save the completed return as 'julian_rossi.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Form T2203 and Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income)
metadata.key_complexity: Form T2203 multiple jurisdictions allocation; T2125 gross/net business income; Line 47600 tax installments paid.
